chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 88 of 2019 SCRA 90 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.23. 2. For orders on CMA No.705/2019. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.706/2019. 16.09.2025 Dr. Imtiaz, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. These references are pending since 2019. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 11.03.2019, time was sought to reformulate the question of law. On 24.12.2019, an adjournment was sought. On 06.02.2020, time was sought yet again to reformulate the question of law. Again on 12.03.2020, time was sought for such purpose again. Same is the case today. In view judgment reported as PLD 2020 SC 518 [CIR vs. Rafeh Limited], these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
